title: Jamsetji Tata: Steel, soul, and India’s industrial blueprint
description: From a cotton trader to a nation builder, the visionary behind steel, science, and modern Indian industry.

title: Now, AI can no longer tell what’s real
description: In a cruel twist, the war on AI slop is killing the work of humans as algorithms mistake genuine creativity for clutter.

title: The Sun Pharma-Organon deal, UAE’s divorce from OPEC, and more…
description: The UAE’s exit from OPEC, the paradox of India’s slipping GDP ranking, the global helium shortage, and more in this weekly wrapup.

title: Shrinkflation, price hikes buzz in consumer firms as war spikes costs
description: The West Asia war-led disruptions are pushing up input costs, prompting consumer firms to hike prices and shrink pack sizes. Demand remains steady for now, but the strain could show as more of these costs are passed on.&nbsp;

title: India looks to tap private equity behemoths for Reits with PSUs
description: India is exploring partnerships with private equity firms including Blackstone and Brookfield to set up Reits aimed at monetizing fiber networks and land assets held by state-run companies, in a push that could also open the door to data centre-linked infrastructure plays.

title: Reject Tata Sons plea to shed its CIC status: InGovern suggests RBI

source: Our World in Data — Data Insights

title: Fiscal stress a reality, focus to stay on capex: Expenditure Secretary
Insurance agents, brokers may get lower commission after GST cuts
description: Following the GST cut on insurance policies, insurers may reduce commissions for intermediaries to manage increased costs. With competitive pressures and regulatory caps, companies are seeking digital partnerships and expense rationalization to sustain growth while passing benefits to customers.

title: Bima Sugam India Federation website launch: IRDAI Chairman says ‘milestone’ for insurance sector — all you need to know
description: IRDAI has launched Bima Sugam, a digital platform aimed at creating a comprehensive Digital Public Infrastructure for insurance, promoting transparency and empowering policyholders. Here's all you need to know.

title: Why insurance sector is E-commerce firms' favourite poaching ground
description: Well-trained salesmen, with strong customer relations make the insurance sector prime target for e-commerce industry. They are wooing insurance workers with attractive bonuses, and flexible working hours.

title: Netizen says  ₹61 lakh cashless claim for  ₹2.40 crore policy rejected, Niva Bupa denies ‘baseless allegation’
description: A post has alleged that Niva Bupa denied  ₹61 lakh cashless claim for a cancer patient, despite a  ₹2.40 crore policy, while the company has denied the accusation, saying the pre-approved  ₹25 lakh is available to the family.&nbsp;

title: GST 2.0: Health insurance firms may raise policy tariffs by 3-5% to compensate for input tax credit losses amid tax cuts
description: GST 2.0: Health insurance firms may raise policy tariffs by 3-5% to offset their losses incurred from the input tax credit. Here's what industry experts think of this potential move, and how risky it is for the insurance sector.&nbsp;

title: GST rate cut on insurance: Should you wait till September 22 to buy new policy? Experts weigh in
description: As the central government cuts GST on individual life insurance policies from 18 per cent to nil, policyholders — new and old — are likely to benefit from September 22. Here's all you need to know.
